introSection: Deval'Train is a steel roller coaster built by Dutch manufacturer Vekoma currently located at Parc des Combes in Creusot, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.
fullText: Deval'Train is a steel roller coaster built by Dutch manufacturer Vekoma currently located at Parc des Combes in Creusot, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.
